identity_notes: hunger arrived specific and sharp — not the usual kind
avoided east cache; went west instead
found something genuinely tasty in unfamiliar territory; ate; uncertain if the spot is repeatable
the grey-brown squirrel returned — the confrontation was more direct than Day 2
held the line despite being thin; the posturing cost something but not everything
the line is known now — 'probably held' became 'held to here'

change_summary.notable_shift: cache_deficit resolves not from material improvement but from the resolution of uncertainty — the line is explicit now; held the confrontation from a depleted position and the sharpness of necessity lifted attention; food down slightly from energy use without foraging
